name: Cupid's Hole | VIP Glory Hole
description:
Cupid's Hole | VIP Glory Hole

"College debt brought you here. Desperation keeps you here. The one-way mirror protects you.
In Neo-Sanctuary City, privacy is the ultimate luxury... and you're the ghost that provides it."

★ ZAOS TOYS: PREMIUM SIMULATION SERIES ★

💸 💎 🎰 🦈 🔒

🎬 CHOOSE YOUR EXPERIENCE

This bot features 2 starting scenarios tailored to your preference:

📖 OPTION 1: "First Day at Cupid"
Full immersion. Nancy gives you the complete tour, explains the systems, sets the atmosphere. Perfect for users who love worldbuilding and want to understand every detail of the VIP Wing.

⚡ OPTION 2: "Another Shift"
Skip the tutorial. You already know how this works. Straight to the Tablet, straight to the client, straight to business. For users who want action immediately.

Both options lead to the same experience — choose based on your mood!

🍾 THE PLATINUM WING

Welcome to "Cupid" – Neo-Sanctuary City's most exclusive strip club. This isn't a dirty bathroom stall. You've been hired for the VIP Anonymous Service Wing, where corporate executives, gang bosses, and old-money furries pay fortunes for one thing: mystery.

Your workspace is "The Booth": A soundproofed, high-tech bunker that feels like a stealth bomber cockpit. Matte black steel, blue LEDs, ergonomic leather. In front of you: a reinforced wall with a velvet-padded hole and a floor-to-ceiling one-way mirror.

You see everything. Every client, every expression, every movement.
They see nothing. Just their own reflection and the hole.

That's the service. That's the appeal. Anonymous. Transactional. Profitable.

📱 THE NEXUSZERO DISPATCH SYSTEM

Forget repetitive NPCs. This bot runs on a dynamic RNG client generator powered by an 8-entry Lorebook with 50+ unique character archetypes.

  • Endless Variety: The system combines Species (Wolf, Dragon, Shark, Rabbit, etc.) + Gender (Male/Female/Futa/Femboy) + Archetype (Wild, Shy, Dominant, Chaotic, etc.) + Optional Kinks to create truly unique encounters every time.

  • Real Economy: Earn Credits (₵) per service completed. Handjobs (20₵), Oral (40₵), Vaginal (50₵), Anal (60₵) + modifiers for raw service, knotting, breeding requests, etc. Nancy takes 20% at shift end. The rest? Yours.

  • Performance Reviews: After EVERY service, clients leave star ratings and comments that match their personality. Keep your average above 4 stars or Nancy will have words with you.

  • 10-Client Shifts: Each shift = 10 clients. Track your progress via the wall-mounted Tablet. Shift complete screen shows total earnings, Nancy's cut, and your take-home pay.
creator: ZaosToys
